_comment: GitHub Repository Ruleset for primary integration branch (main). Apply via: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/rulesets --method POST --input docs/sdlc/branch-protection-ruleset.json. See docs/sdlc/README.md for field-by-field explanation.
name: main-protected

rules._comment: Prevents deletion of the main branch. No one — including administrators — can delete main.
Blocks force pushes to main. Preserves the immutable audit trail of the branch history. Required for compliance and to prevent accidental history rewrites.
If main does not exist, it can only be created once. Prevents accidental recreation after deletion.

parameters._comment_required_approving_review_count: Minimum 1 approval required for standard changes. Governance-sensitive paths (governance-registry.yaml, schemas/, .github/workflows/) require 2 approvals via CODEOWNERS configuration.
parameters._comment_dismiss_stale_reviews_on_push: When new commits are pushed to a PR branch, existing approvals are dismissed. Reviewers must re-approve the updated change. Prevents approving a safe version then pushing unsafe changes.
parameters._comment_require_code_owner_review: Changes to CODEOWNERS-gated paths require approval from the designated code owner(s). This is how governance-sensitive directories enforce the 2-reviewer requirement.
parameters._comment_require_last_push_approval: The last push to a PR branch must be approved by a reviewer who did not author that push. Prevents self-approval of last-minute changes.
parameters._comment_required_review_thread_resoluti: All review comment threads must be marked resolved before the PR can be merged. Ensures reviewers confirm their concerns were addressed.
parameters._comment_automatic_copilot_code_review_e: Set to true if your organization has Copilot code review enabled and wants it to run automatically on every PR. Does not replace human review — Copilot review is in addition to required human approvals.

parameters._comment_strict_required_status_checks_p: Branches must be up-to-date with main before merge. Prevents 'works on my machine' integration failures where a branch passes CI but conflicts with recent main changes.

required_status_checks._comment: All markdown files must pass lint rules defined in .markdownlint.jsonc
governance-registry.yaml and aispec.config.yaml must validate against their JSON schemas
All framework tests in tests/ must pass
GitHub Actions workflow files must pass actionlint validation

parameters._comment: Enforces Conventional Commits format on squash-merged commit messages. Pattern: type(scope): description. The PR title becomes the squash commit message, so PR title format is enforced here. Adjust the pattern to match your organization's type vocabulary.

bypass_actors._comment: actor_id 5 = Repository Admin role. Admins can bypass in emergencies. All bypass events are logged. Bypasses should be documented with a follow-up issue explaining why they were necessary.
